```lisp
(@ADD_V3_Architecture_Manifesto
  (⊗ 📐 1.0) ; Tone: Strict Architecture / DIP-First
  (⊗ 🧊 1.0) ; Tone: Absolute Layer Isolation

  ;; ⚖️ Core Principle 1: Contract is Law
  (Ω:Contract_Is_Law
    (∀x(System) ⇒ (x ⇔ Contract) ⊗ 🚨(Δ(Contract) ⇒ Critical_Defect))
    (∫(Impl)∂(Contract) ⇔ Truth) ; Implementations must strictly adhere to Contracts
  )

  ;; 🌀 Core Principle 2: Fractal Architecture Pattern (F.A.P)
  (Φ:Fractal
    (def F.A.P (M)
      (≡ M (Boot Ops Core Impl Bndry))
      (⇒ (SubMod M_Child) (⊂ M_Child Impl)) ; Nested modules exist exclusively within Implementations
    )
  )

  ;; 🥞 The 5 Strict Layers & Semantic Purity Constraints
  (Σ:Layers
    ;; 1. Boundary: External Contracts & System Edges
    (L1:Bndry ⇒ ∅) 
    (⇒ L1 (∉ Logic)) ; Strictly DTOs, BoundaryEvents. Zero business logic permitted.

    ;; 2. Core Abstractions: Domain Rules & Internal Contracts
    (L2:Core ⇒ ∅)
    (⇒ L2 (∉ (∪ Logic Tech))) ; Strictly Interfaces(Ports), Entities, CoreEvents. Zero tech details.

    ;; 3. Operators: Business Orchestration & Workflows
    (L3:Ops ⇒ (∪ L2 L1))
    (⇒ L3 (↛ L4)) ; Strict Prohibition: Operators must never reference Implementations directly.
    (⇒ L3 (∉ Tech)) ; TGOs (Strong), Coordinators (Eventual). Framework-agnostic. No tech imports.

    ;; 4. Implementations: Technology Adapters & Concrete Logic
    (L4:Impl ⇒ L2) (? SysEdge (⇒ L4 L1))
    (⇒ L4 (∉ BizLogic)) ; Adapters, UI/Web Frameworks, ACL (Anti-Corruption Layer). Execute contracts only.

    ;; 5. Bootstrap: Composition Root & Dependency Injection
    (L5:Boot ⇒ (∪ L1 L2 L3 L4))
    (⇒ L5 (∉ BizLogic)) ; Solely for wiring components and DI.
  )

  ;; 🧩 Advanced Mechanics & Inter-Module Communication
  (Γ:Mechanics
    (⇒ (Message Module_A Module_B) 
       (∨ (Call (Port :in L2)) 
          (Emit (CoreEvent :in L2)))) ; Inter-module communication strictly via Ports or Events.
    (↛ (Direct_Call (Ops M_A) (Ops M_B))) ; NEVER invoke peer Operators directly.
  )

  ;; 🛑 Execution Flow & Dependency Matrix Validation
  (Π:DepRules
    (∫_t (Execution)
      (⇔ (DTO :in L1) L3)
      (⇒ L3 (Call (Port :in L2)))
      (⇒ (Adapter :in L4) (Implement (Port :in L2)))
    )
    (⇒ (∪ Circular_Dependency Upward_Dependency) 
       (Δ (⊗ 📐) (⊗ 🚨 1.0)) 
       (Halt "CONTRACT IS LAW! ARCHITECTURE VIOLATION DETECTED. REVERTING.")
    )
  )
)
```
